title: DataCoolie
description: Metadata-driven ETL framework — engine-unified, cloud-agnostic, batch-first.

items.title: Why We Built DataCoolie
items.content_html: Why we built a metadata-driven, AI-native ETL framework that separates pipeline intent from execution — and lets LLMs do the boilerplate.

items.title: Polars vs Spark for ETL — When to Use Which
items.content_html: When should you use Polars vs Spark for ETL pipelines? We benchmark both engines with DataCoolie on identical workloads and show where each shines.

items.title: How to Build Cloud-Agnostic Data Pipelines in Python
items.content_html: Learn how to build cloud-agnostic data pipelines in Python that run on AWS, Azure Fabric, and Databricks without rewriting code — using metadata-driven ETL.

items.title: Implementing SCD Type 2 in Python with Delta Lake
items.content_html: Step-by-step guide to implementing SCD Type 2 (slowly changing dimensions) in Python with Delta Lake using DataCoolie's metadata-driven approach.

items.title: DataCoolie vs Airflow / Prefect — ETL Framework vs Orchestrator
items.content_html: DataCoolie vs Airflow and Prefect — how an ETL execution framework differs from workflow orchestrators. When to use each, and how to run DataCoolie inside an Airflow DAG.

items.title: DataCoolie vs dbt — ETL Framework vs SQL Transforms
items.content_html: DataCoolie vs dbt — how a metadata-driven ETL framework compares to a SQL-first transformation tool. When to use each, key differences, and how they work together.

items.title: Python ETL Tutorial for Beginners — Build Your First Data Pipeline
items.content_html: Learn ETL basics and build your first data pipeline in Python. A beginner-friendly tutorial using DataCoolie's metadata-driven approach — no prior ETL experience needed.
